snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney
Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | SEMI-FINALS | Day 1 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

The BMPS 2026 Semi Finals begin!

24 teams, divided into 3 groups, have made it this far, but the journey to the Grand Finals is only getting tougher. With all groups (A, B & C) in action today, every team begins their campaign to secure a direct ticket to the biggest stage of the tournament.

Only the Top 6 teams will qualify directly for the Grand Finals. The bottom 2 teams will be eliminated, while the remaining 16 teams will get one final opportunity through the Last Chance stage.

The road to glory continues and every point starts counting from here 🔥

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹4Cr

Map Rotation
Match ⚔️1 : Rondo - Group AB
Match ⚔️2 : Erangel - Group AB
Match ⚔️3 : Erangel - Group AB

snippet.title: SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) | Puri Jagannadh | Vijay Sethupathi | Tabu | Samyuktha
snippet.description:
SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) on Puri Jagannadh YouTube Channel.

SlumDog - 33 Temple Road is an upcoming gritty pan-India action drama which brings dashing director Puri Jagannadh and versatile actor Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi together for one of the most intriguing collaborations. Also co-stars Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay and others. Produced by Puri Jagannadh and Charmme Kaur under the Puri Connects banner, in collaboration with JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla's JB Motion Pictures. 

#PuriJagannadh #VijaySethupathi #SlumDog33TempleRoad #Tabu #Samyuktha #DuniyaVijay #CharmmeKaur #PuriConnects #LatestTeluguMovieTeasers #LatestTeluguMovies

snippet.title: Vallah (Official Video) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Bayanni, Harrdy S, Amitabh B | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
Warning: #Vallah may cause sudden dancing. 
Song out now.

#Cocktail2 in cinemas on June 19.

#Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Music Label : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Music - Pritam
➟ Lyrics- Amitabh Bhattacharya
➟ Punjabi Lyrics - Rony Ajnali and Gill Machhrai
➟ Singers - Bayanni, Harrdy Sandhu

➟ Music Programmer and Arranger - AM.AN
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Audio Post Production Supervisor and Chief Engineer - Ashwin Kulkarni

Music Production Managers - Anurag Sharma, Brianna Supriyo
Studio Manager - Mithila Lad Nayak

Sound Engineers - Pranav Gupta, Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee

Studio Assistants - Khush Jaggi, Ameya Dayal, Sagnik Mukherjee. 
Studio Intern- Anushree Amod

Shout - Aasa Singh
Backing Vocals Design and Vocals -  Aarvan, Aniruddh Anantha
Additional Chorus - Anurag Sharma, Akash Mukherjee, Sagnik Mukherjee

Live Guitars by - AM.AN 

Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai


#Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026


🎬 Video Credits

➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:

Ohh

let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI

Jaadu kar gayi oh mere te
Dassa main kinu
Nain shraabi jihde yaaro
Pee gayi menu 

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu

Sham dhali to nain tere ni
Hor v sohne ho jande ne
Chann v terian siftan karda
Taare pagal ho jande ne
Patlo Banke agg hai firdi
Bijli wangu saade te girdi
cock-tail to vad ke saroor a
matthe te jedi latt a girdi

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu 

Tere ch dhyaan mera renda sohniye
Dass kinne lakh da ae lehanga sohniye
Nakhre tere te a news ban gayi
Diamond de naal o vad mehanga 
Jado tu nachh diye baby 
Bada hi jach diye baby 
Ya tu pari air shaadi
Ya tu kachh diye aaae baby

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu

© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

snippet.title: SADI SUN - Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa | Harsh Nussi | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Sadi Sun featuring Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa.

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Harsh Nussi 
Lyrics & Composer : Harsh Nussi x Deep Klair
Music : Harsh Nussi
Guitar : Sachin Sheriya
Engineered by : Hiten

Vice President : Raghav Sharma ( Pratick Sharma)
Label Manager : Sankalp Garg
Project Head : Gaurav Arora
Legal & Digital Manager : Ashima Chauhan

Artwork : Vicky Sandhu
Accounts Manager : Sanjay Sharma & Rajkummar Jha
Legal Asst : Maninder Kaur
Special Thanks : Virgin Music India

https://www.virginmusic.com/

Virgin Music India Team :-
Head : Amit Sharma 
Team : Nagesh Jadhav, Kajal Israni, Amol Suryavanshi, Krupa Munvar, Lavanya Dass & Nishtha Sikroria

Associated Brands :- 
DSG Investments Pvt. Ltd. (https://www.dsginvestments.com)
UPES University (https://www.upes.ac.in/)
Optima Insurance Brokers Private Limited (https://optima.co.in/)

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi

snippet.title: Enola Holmes 3 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
It will take a Holmes, to save a Holmes. The critically-acclaimed ‘Enola Holmes’ franchise has returned, taking Enola far from London, where personal and professional dreams collide on a case more tangled and treacherous than any she has faced before. Directed by Philip Barantini (the Emmy Award-winning director of ‘Adolescence’), the film stars Millie Bobby Brown, Louis Partridge, Henry Cavill, and Helena Bonham Carter. ENOLA HOLMES 3 premieres JULY 1, only on Netflix.

ENOLA HOLMES 1 and ENOLA HOLMES 2 are NOW PLAYING.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81605886

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Enola Holmes 3 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

bn.title: স্পাইডার-ম্যানের ট্রেইলার আবার ফাঁস? ডুমসডে ট্রেইলার কেলেঙ্কারি? - রোস্টভার্স ১৭২
bn.description:
ভিডিওটি ভালো লাগলে একটি 'লাইক' দিন

০০:০০ ভূমিকা
০০:২৭ এমসিইউ-তে রুসোদের ভবিষ্যৎ
০০:৫৭ ব্যাকরুমস-এর সিক্যুয়েল তৈরি হচ্ছে...?
০১:১২ ম্যান অফ টুমরো সেটের তথ্য ফাঁস...
০২:০০ ৩০-এর দশকে স্পাইডার...
০২:৩৭ দ্য ওডিসি-র খবর ও আপডেট
০৩:১৩ সাপ্তাহিক গেমিং পর্ব
০৫:৪১ মানে যা খুশি...
০৬:৪২ ০০৭ ফার্স্ট লাইট সিক্যুয়েলের বড় আপডেট!!!

০৭:১৫ অ্যাভেঞ্জার্স: ডুমসডে রি-শুট আপডেট
০৭:৩১ নেটফ্লিক্স তাদের আসল চেহারা দেখালো!!?

০৮:০৭ ডব্লিউবিডি-প্যারামাউন্ট আপডেট
০৮:৪৪ স্পাইডার-ম্যান: বিএনডি-র লেখক প্রকাশ পেলেন!!?

০৯:০০ চুনা লাগিয়ে দিয়েছে!!!
১১:৪৪ ফাঁস করে দিয়েছ না...
১২:৫১ স্পাইডার-ম্যান ট্রেইলার আবার ফাঁস হলো!!?

১৫:১৭ স্পাইডার-ম্যান: ব্র্যান্ড নিউ ডে-এর রানটাইম
১৫:২৬ মোকটেল সেগমেন্ট
১৫:৩৭ আউটরো

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

snippet.title: Tanha Reh Jayege – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Tanha Reh Jayege – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Tere jaane ke baad…
hum tanha reh jayege.

Jo khwaab
tere saath dekhe the…
wo adhure hi
reh jayege.

Hum muskura to denge…
par dil ke zakhm
kabhi bhar na paayenge.

“Tanha Reh Jayege”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo mohabbat me
khud ko poori tarah kho baitha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
yaadein bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

tere bina
hum tanha reh jayege…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir uske bina jeena pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

Watch the Official Teaser of Jeevan Bheema Yojana, an upcoming Bollywood Crime-Comedy Thriller starring Arshad Warsi in his first-ever double role as Jeevan and Bheema.

Directed by Abhishek Dogra (Dolly Ki Doli, FryDay), this entertaining blend of crime, comedy, mystery, and suspense features an ensemble cast including Sanjeeda Shaikh, Vijay Raaz, Pooja Chopra, and Bijendra Kala.

Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

snippet.title: Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho (From "Maharaja") Govinda, Manisha Koirala | Sonu Nigam | Kavita Krishnamurthy
snippet.description:
A timeless romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy. Composed by Nadeem-Shravan with lyrics by Sameer, this song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and togetherness. Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Maharaja
Starring: Govinda, Manisha Koirala
Director: Anil Sharma
Producer: Naraindas Mukhija
Label: Universal Music India

संग तुम्हार ठंडी छाया, सारी दुनिया धूप है

hi.title: Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho (From "Maharaja") Govinda, Manisha Koirala | Sonu Nigam | Kavita Krishnamurthy
hi.description:
A timeless romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy. Composed by Nadeem-Shravan with lyrics by Sameer, this song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and togetherness. Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Maharaja
Starring: Govinda, Manisha Koirala
Director: Anil Sharma
Producer: Naraindas Mukhija
Label: Universal Music India

snippet.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
snippet.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

fr-FR.title: Whalefall | Teaser officiel | Au cinéma le 16 octobre
fr-FR.description:
Les chances d'être avalé vivant par une baleine ne sont pas nulles.

Découvrez la nouvelle bande-annonce de #Whalefall et ne manquez pas le film, en salles le 16 octobre.

Après la mort de son père (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) plonge au large des côtes californiennes à la recherche de sa dépouille, mais il est avalé par un immense cachalot. Piégé dans son ventre avec seulement une heure d'oxygène restante, Jay comprend que les leçons durement acquises par son père pourraient bien être la clé de sa survie.

id.title: Whalefall | Teaser Resmi | Tayang di Bioskop 16 Oktober
id.description:
Peluang ditelan hidup-hidup oleh paus bukanlah nol.

Saksikan teaser baru untuk #Whalefall dan tonton filmnya hanya di bioskop pada 16 Oktober.

Setelah kematian ayahnya (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) menyelam di lepas pantai tengah California untuk mencari jenazahnya, tetapi ditelan oleh paus sperma raksasa. Terperangkap di dalam perutnya dengan hanya satu jam oksigen tersisa, Jay menyadari bahwa pelajaran berharga yang diberikan ayahnya mungkin menjadi kunci untuk meloloskannya.

en.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
en.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

pt-BR.title: Whalefall | Teaser Oficial | Nos cinemas em 16 de outubro
pt-BR.description:
As chances de ser engolido vivo por uma baleia não são zero.

Assista ao novo teaser de #Whalefall e veja o filme exclusivamente nos cinemas a partir de 16 de outubro.

Após a morte de seu pai (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) mergulha na costa central da Califórnia em busca de seus restos mortais, mas é engolido por uma enorme baleia cachalote. Preso em seu estômago com apenas uma hora de oxigênio restante, Jay percebe que as lições duramente aprendidas com seu pai podem ser a chave para sua fuga.

de-DE.title: Whalefall | Offizieller Teaser | Ab 16. Oktober im Kino
de-DE.description:
Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, von einem Wal lebendig verschluckt zu werden, ist nicht gleich null.

Sehen Sie sich den neuen Teaser zu #Whalefall an und erleben Sie den Film ab dem 16. Oktober im Kino.

Nach dem Tod seines Vaters (Josh Brolin) taucht Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) vor der Küste Kaliforniens, um dessen sterbliche Überreste zu finden. Dabei wird er von einem riesigen Pottwal verschluckt. Gefangen im Bauch des Wals und mit nur noch einer Stunde Sauerstoff, erkennt Jay, dass die hart erarbeiteten Lektionen seines Vaters der Schlüssel zu seiner Flucht sein könnten.

es-US.title: Whalefall | Tráiler oficial | En cines el 16 de octubre
es-US.description:
Las probabilidades de ser tragado vivo por una ballena no son nulas.

Mira el nuevo tráiler de #Whalefall y disfruta de la película solo en cines a partir del 16 de octubre.

Tras la muerte de su padre (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) bucea en la costa central de California en busca de sus restos, pero es tragado por un enorme cachalote. Atrapado en su vientre con solo una hora de oxígeno, Jay se da cuenta de que las valiosas lecciones que su padre le inculcó podrían ser la clave para escapar.

hi.title: व्हेलफॉल | आधिकारिक टीज़र | 16 अक्टूबर को सिनेमाघरों में
hi.description:
व्हेल द्वारा जिंदा निगल लिए जाने की संभावना शून्य नहीं है।

#Whalefall का नया टीज़र देखें और फिल्म 16 अक्टूबर को सिनेमाघरों में देखें।

अपने पिता (जोश ब्रोलिन) की मृत्यु के बाद, जे गार्डिनर (ऑस्टिन अब्राम्स) उनके अवशेषों की तलाश में कैलिफोर्निया के मध्य तट पर गोताखोरी करने जाता है, लेकिन एक विशाल स्पर्म व्हेल उसे निगल जाती है। व्हेल के पेट में फंसे हुए, जहाँ उसके पास केवल एक घंटे की ऑक्सीजन बची है, जे को एहसास होता है कि उसके पिता द्वारा सिखाए गए कठिन परिश्रम से सीखे गए सबक ही उसकी जान बचा सकते हैं।

it.title: Whalefall | Teaser Ufficiale | Al cinema dal 16 ottobre
it.description:
Le probabilità di essere inghiottiti vivi da una balena non sono pari a zero.

Guarda il nuovo teaser di #Whalefall e non perderti il ​​film al cinema dal 16 ottobre.

Dopo la morte del padre (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) si immerge al largo della costa centrale della California alla ricerca dei suoi resti, ma viene inghiottito da un enorme capodoglio. Intrappolato nel suo ventre con solo un'ora di ossigeno a disposizione, Jay si rende conto che gli insegnamenti impartitigli dal padre potrebbero essere la chiave per la sua salvezza.

snippet.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai - Title Track | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Anu M, Javed - Mohsin, Sameer A
snippet.description:
Get ready to groove to the electrifying title track "Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai"! Packed with vibrant energy, catchy beats, and youthful romance, this song is the perfect celebration of love, fun, and unforgettable moments.

snippet.title: O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️| 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026 #90s #song
snippet.description:
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️| 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026 #90s #song  
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
• Retro Bollywood feel 🎞️
• Emotional aur soulful lyrics 💔
• Soft melody jo dil ko chhoo jaaye 🎶
• Old is gold style romantic vibe ✨

Agar aapko 90's Bollywood songs, sad love songs, aur Hindi romantic music pasand hai, to yeh gaana aapke playlist me zaroor hona chahiye.

🎧 Best experience ke liye headphones use karein

👉 Like 👍 | Share 🔄 | Subscribe 🔔 zaroor karein
👉 Comment me batayein aapko yeh gaana kaisa laga ❤️

(Song Lyrics) 

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
सपनों में मेरे फिर समा जा।
तेरी बातों का रंग निराला,
दिल को मेरे फिर बहला जा॥

जब से देखा तेरा चेहरा,
दिल ने तुझको अपना माना।
चाँद भी शरमा जाए देखे,
तेरा प्यारा सा मुस्काना॥

पायल की छम-छम सुनकर,
दिल मेरा बेकरार हो जाए।
एक नज़र जो तू मिलाए,
हर मौसम बहार हो जाए॥

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
दिल की गलियों में फिर छा जा।
तेरी हँसी का जादू ऐसा,
सारी दुनिया को भुला जा॥

तेरी ज़ुल्फों की ठंडी छाँव,
मुझको अपना घर लगती है।
तेरी बातों की मीठी खुशबू,
साँसों में घुल जाती है॥

रातों को जब याद तू आए,
नींदों का पता खो जाए।
दिल के हर एक कोने में बस,
तेरा ही चेहरा नज़र आए॥

आ जा सजना देर न करना,
दिल को यूँ मजबूर न करना।
तेरे बिना ये तन्हा रातें,
लगती हैं सदियों के जैसा॥

snippet.title: Raakh - Official Trailer 2 | Ali Fazal, Sonali Bendre, Aamir Bashir, Rakesh Bedi | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Raakh Official Trailer 2
Starring Ali Fazal, Sonali Bendre, Aamir Bashir, Akash Makhija, Ramandeep Yadav, Divya Sharma, Vivaan Sharma, Anshul Chauhan, Rakesh Bedi, Dibyendu Bhattacharya
Directed by Prosit Roy, Anusha Nandakumar, Sandeep Saket
Co directors: Anusha & Sandeep
Written by Anusha Nandakumar, Sandeep Saket
Produced by Endemol Shine India BhaDiPa

Official Release Date - June 12, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Raakh is a haunting crime investigation that begins with the disappearance and murder of two teenagers in Delhi. Set in 1978, when such brutality was rare and shocking, the series follows the relentless manhunt launched to track down the killers while exploring the disturbing psyche of the men behind the crime.                                         

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#raakh #alifazal #sonalibendrebehl #crime #thriller #newseries #webseries #trailer #officialtrailer #RaakhOnPrime #primevideoindia

snippet.title: गुप् चुप गुप् चुप | Gup Chup Gup Chup | Alka Yagnik | Ila Arun | Karan Arjun | 90's Dance Songs
snippet.description:
गुप् चुप गुप् चुप | Gup Chup Gup Chup | Alka Yagnik | Ila Arun | Karan Arjun | 90's Dance Songs

#dancesongs #ilaarun #alkayagnik #karanarjun #90sdancesongs 

Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Ila Arun, Alka Yagnik
Music Director : Rajesh Roshan
Lyricist : Indeevar

Movie Cast & Crew :
Producer : Rakesh Roshan
Director : Rakesh Roshan
Cast : Salman Khan, Shahrukh Khan, Kajol, Mamta Kulkarni, Raakhee, Amrish Puri

Song Lyrics :

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup 
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Kya Kaheen Kar Aayi Tu Munh Kaala Re 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Kaanon Mein Batiyaan Karti Hain Sakhiyaan 
Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Vo Bahanoi Tha Bahanoi Thahara 
Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bahanoi Ne Odh Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Main Samajhi Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Piya Ka Hai Bistar Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata To Hoga
Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bhool Hui Mujhase To Kaisa Achambha
Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha
Bahanoi Tha Piya Jitana Lamba
Piya Jitana Lamba Piya Jitana Lamba
Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se 
Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Soch Rahe The Ham Sab Jaisa
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Toone Kiya Nahi Kuch Vaisa 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Mukhade Pe Tere Sach Ka Ujaala 
Raat Kiya Nahi Munh Toone Kaala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

#GupChupGupChup #KaranArjun #MamtaKulkarni #AlkaYagnik #IlaArun #RajeshRoshan

snippet.title: Teri Meri Kahaani | Gabbar Is Back | Akshay Kumar, Kareena Kapoor | Arijit Singh & Palak M | Lyrical
snippet.description:
Song: Teri Meri Kahaani
Movie: Gabbar Is Back
Singers: Arijit Singh & Palak Muchhal
Lyricist: Manoj Yadav
Composer: Chirantan Bhatt
Recording, Mixing & Mastering: Vinod Verma

Banner: Viacom18 Motion Pictures & Bhansali Productions
Producer: Viacom18 Motion Pictures & Sanjay Leela Bhansali 
Co-Producer: Shabinaa Khan
Director: Krish

Lyrics:
Mujh Mein Safar Tu Karti Rahe
Har Ek Saans Mein Guzarti Rahe

Shaam O Subah Tu Mera
Tere Bina Kya Mera
Do Jism Jaan Ek Hai
Na Hona Kabhi Tu Judaa

Teri Meri Kahaani
Hai Baarishon Ka Paani
Banke Jo Ishq Barse
Teri Meri Kahaani (X2)

Dekho Na Kaisi Ijaazat Mili Hai
Ek Doosre Mein Hifaazat Mili Hai

Jeene Ki Saari Zaroorat Mili Hai
Yeh Jo Bhi Hai Jaisa Hai
Yun Hi Hamesha Hamesha Rahe Jis Tarah

Shaam O Subah Tu Mera
Tere Bina Kya Mera
Do Jism Jaan Ek Hain
Na Hona Kabhi Tu Judaa

Teri Meri Kahaani
Hai Baarishon Ka Paani
Banke Jo Ishq Barse
Teri Meri Kahaani (X2)

Mujh Mein Safar Tu Karti Rahe
Har Ek Saans Mein Guzarti Rahe

Hum Se Yeh Jo Bhi Harqat Hui Hai
Mohabbat Mohabbat Mohabbat Hui Hai

Kuch Itne Hain Hum Tum
Kami Kuch Nahi Hai
Jitna Bhi Jeena Hai
Tujhko Hi Jeena Hai
Jeete Rahein Jis Tarah

Tere Bina Kya Mera
Do Jism Jaan Ek Hai
Na Hona Kabhi Tu Judaa

Teri Meri Kahaani

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Kandha Sashti Kavasam Tamil | Murugan Bhakti Padalgal 🙏 | Powerful Murugan Tamil Devotional Songs
snippet.description:
Kandha Sashti Kavasam Tamil | Murugan Bhakti Padalgal 🙏 | Powerful Murugan Tamil Devotional Songs 

00:00 Kanda Sashti Kavasam 

Experience the divine power of Lord Murugan with this soulful collection of Kanda Sashti Kavacham Tamil and Vel Murugan Devotional Songs. 🙏 Listen to the most powerful Murugan bhakti songs filled with spiritual energy, positivity, and blessings. This Tamil devotional collection is perfect for daily prayers, Tuesday worship, Skanda Sashti viratham, meditation, and peaceful devotional listening.

May Lord Muruga bless you with courage, success, happiness, and protection from all negative energies. Vel Vel Muruga! Haro Hara! 🔱

♪ Kanda Sashti Kavacham
♪ Vel Murugan Songs Tamil
♪ Murugan Bhakti Padalgal
♪ Tamil Devotional Songs
♪ Powerful Murugan Mantras & Devotional Collection

Listen, pray, and receive the divine blessings of Lord Subramanya. Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more Tamil devotional songs. 🙏

snippet.title: Tujhko Na Dekhun To Ji Ghabarata Hai | Udit Narayan | Jaanwar (1999) | Evergreen Emotional Hit
snippet.description:
Relive the emotional magic of "Tujhko Na Dekhun To Ji Ghabarata Hai" from the blockbuster movie Jaanwar (1999). Featuring Akshay Kumar and Master Aditya Kapadia, this heart-touching song is beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Sunidhi Chauhan. With melodious music by Anand-Milind and heartfelt lyrics by Sameer, this timeless 90s classic continues to win hearts.

Song : Tujhko Na Dekhun To Ji Ghabarata Hai
Tujhko Na Dekhun To Jee Ghabrata Hai 
Movie : Jaanwar (1999)
Singer : Udit Narayan & Sunidhi Chauhan

Lyrics : Sameer

bn.title: ডিফেন্ডিং চ্যাম্পিয়নস AX সবার শীর্ষে #১ | RECKONING ESPORTS দারুণ ফর্মে 🔥
bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

snippet.title: बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs
snippet.description:
बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

गणेश जी के रोज नए नए भजन सुनने के लिए हमारे साथ जुड़ें रहे व् नए नए भजनों का आनंद उठाये भजन पसंद आये तो कमेंट में '' जय श्री गणेश " जरुर लिखें || Jai Shree Shyam 🌹🌹

⭐Song :  

गजानंद तुम्हे पहले मनाएं
सबसे पहले तुम्हे मनाऊं गौरी सूत 
गणपति गणेश को मेरा प्रणाम 
गजानन कर दो बेड़ा पार
मेरे लाडले गणेश प्यारे प्यारे
श्री गणेश अमृतवाणी
अपने रंग रंगलो गजानन
श्री गणेश जी के 108 नाम
लड्डुवन का भोग हूँ लाई 
श्री गणेश जी की आरती
⭐Singer : Sanchit + Upasana mehta 
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)
भक्ति साधना कंपनी से भजन बनवाने के लिए और भजन रिलीज़ करवाने के लिए संपर्क करे 9466651081
                     


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                                      🎧 Listen On Streaming Sites

🎵Gaana        https://gaana.com/artist/upasana-mehta
🎵JioSaawan https://www.jiosaavn.com/artist/upasana-mehta/MiW60hV8raw_

snippet.title: Mahatma | Official Video | Farmani Naaz | Anil Rawat | Sad Song | Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
#Mahatma #महात्मा #farmaninaaz #haryanvisong #naazmusic #anilrawat #haryanvi #djsong #song #priyaydv #love #bholenath 

Song  - Mahatma | महात्मा
Artist   -  Abhi Kashyal | Priya Yadav | Anil Rawat | Daya Shankar
Lyrics  - Daya Shankar 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Anil Rawat
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Composer - Daya Shankar 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

LYRICS - 

[Verse 1]
[male vocals]
Tunne khoob kari manmani
Na tujhe maine roka
Jaan se zyada kiya bharosa
Kahe diya mujhe dhoka
Ho mat na meri fikar kare
Jo milega woh khawengo
Aur hath kamandal le karke
Babaji ban jawengo

[Chorus]
Mahatma  mane banagi re chori dar dar bhatkagi re
Mahatma  mane banagi re chori dar dar bhatkagi re
[synth lead hook]

[Verse 2]
Meri kismat foot gayi maine toh se dil jo lagaya
Re tu toh baba ban gaya bairi nek taras na aaya
Re tu toh baba ban gaya bairi nek taras na aaya
Ho kanthi mala daal gale bhakti mein ram jawengo
Aur peekar bhaang dhatura bhool mein saare gham jawengo

[Chorus]
Mahatma  mane banagi re chori dar dar bhatkagi re
Mahatma  mane banagi re chori dar dar bhatkagi re
[synth lead hook]

[Verse 3]
Upar wale ki sewa kar din raat tujhe hi maanga
Prem dore ka bandha hua tha tod diya woh dhaga
Prem dore ka bandha hua tha tod diya woh dhaga
Ho pyar ke laage bure chochle ab na dil ko lagawun
Aur phera bhi na daru saath chahe baba hi mar jawun

[Chorus]
Mahatma  mane banagi re chori dar dar bhatkagi re
Mahatma  mane banagi re chori dar dar bhatkagi re
[Outro]
[synth lead fades, electronic beat continues]
It's a GR Music

**[Verse 1]**
**[male vocals]**
तूने खूब करी मनमानी
ना तुझे मैंने रोका
जान से ज़्यादा किया भरोसा
काहे दिया मुझे धोखा
हो मत ना मेरी फिकर करे
जो मिलेगा वो खावेंगे
और हाथ कमंडल ले करके
बाबाजी बन जावेंगे

**[Chorus]**
महात्मा मने बनागी रे, छोरी दर-दर भटकागी रे
महात्मा मने बनागी रे, छोरी दर-दर भटकागी रे
**[synth lead hook]**

**[Verse 2]**
मेरी किस्मत फूट गई, मैंने तोसे दिल जो लगाया
रे तू तो बाबा बन गया बैरी, नेक तरस ना आया
रे तू तो बाबा बन गया बैरी, नेक तरस ना आया
हो कंठी माला डाल गले, भक्ति में रम जावेंगे
और पीकर भांग धतूरा, भूल में सारे ग़म जावेंगे

**[Chorus]**
महात्मा मने बनागी रे, छोरी दर-दर भटकागी रे
महात्मा मने बनागी रे, छोरी दर-दर भटकागी रे
**[synth lead hook]**

**[Verse 3]**
ऊपर वाले की सेवा कर, दिन-रात तुझे ही मांगा
प्रेम डोरे का बंधा हुआ था, तोड़ दिया वो धागा
प्रेम डोरे का बंधा हुआ था, तोड़ दिया वो धागा
हो प्यार के लागे बुरे चोचले, अब ना दिल को लगावूं
और फेरा भी ना धरूं, साथ चाहे बाबा ही मर जावूं

**[Chorus]**
महात्मा मने बनागी रे, छोरी दर-दर भटकागी रे
महात्मा मने बनागी रे, छोरी दर-दर भटकागी रे

bn.description:
পপি প্লেটাইম চ্যাপ্টার ৬ টিজার ট্রেলার রিঅ্যাকশন সম্পূর্ণ গেমপ্লে (হিন্দি)

আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লাগবে এবং আপনারা এটি উপভোগ করবেন :)

snippet.title: रिम झिम रिम झिम (1942: ए लव स्टोरी) | 1942 A Love Story | Kavita Krishnamurthy
snippet.description:
90 के दशक की जादुई आवाजों में डूबी '1942: ए लव स्टोरी' का यह सदाबहार नगमा 'रिम झिम रिम झिम' आज भी प्रेमियों के दिलों को छू लेता है। कुमार सानू और कविता कृष्णमूर्ति की सुरीली जुगलबंदी और आर.डी. बर्मन का संगीत इस गाने को एक कालजयी रचना बनाता है। यह गीत प्यार की उस मासूमियत और बारिश की बूंदों की ताजगी को दर्शाता है, जो हर दिल में एक मीठी याद जगा देता है। इस भावुक सफर में खो जाने के लिए तैयार हो जाइए।



Credits :

Song: Rim Jhim Rim Jhim (1942-A Love Story)
Album: 1942 A Love Story
Artist: Kavita Krishnamurthy | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: R.D. Burman
Lyricist: Javed Akhtar 



Lyrics :

Rimjhim rimjhim
Rumjhum rumjhum
Bheegi bheegi rut mein
Tum hum hum tum
Chalte hain,chalte hain


Bajta hai jaltarang teal ki chhat pe jab
Motiyon jaisa jal barse
Boondon ki ye ldai laayi hai vo ghadi
Jiske liye hum tarse
Ho ho ho bajta hai
Jaltarang teal ki chhat pe jab
Motiyon jaisa jal barse
Boondon ki ye ldai laayi hai vo ghadi
Jiske liye hum tarse


Ha ha ha rimjhim rimjhim
Rumjhum rumjhum
Bheegi bheegi rut mein
Tum hum hum tum
Ho chalte hain
Chalte hain


Baadal ki chaadarein
Odhe hain vaadiyaan
Saari dishayein soyi hain
Sapnon ke gaon mein
Bheegi si chhaon mein
Do aatmayein khoyi hain
Ho baadal ki chaadarein
Odhe hain vaadiyaan
Saari dishayein soyi hain
Sapnon ke gaon mein
Bheegi si chhaon mein
Do aatmayein khoyi hain


Rimjhim rimjhim rumjhum rumjhum
Bheegi bheegi rut mein
Tum hum hum tum
Ho chalte hain
Chalte hain


Aaye hain dekhne jheelon ke aaine
Belon ko khole ghatayein
Raah hai dhuaan dhuaan
Jayenge hum kahan
Aao yahin reh jayein
Aaye hain dekhne jheelon ke aaine
Belon ko khole ghatayein
Raah hai dhuaan dhuaan
Jayenge hum kahan
Aao yahin reh jayein


Rimjhim rimjhim rimjhim
Rumjhum rumjhum rumjhum
Bheegi bheegi rut mein
Hey hey tum hnum hum tum
Ho chalte hain
Chalte hain


Rimjhim rimjhim
Rimjhim rimjhim
Rumjhum rumjhum
Rumjhum rumjhum
Bheegi bheegi rut mein
Tum hum hum tum
Ho chalte hain
Chalte hain ..

अगर आपको यह खूबसूरत गाना पसंद आया हो, तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपने पसंदीदा 90 के दशक के गाने के बारे में बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब जरूर करें।

Let the magic of music live on…

hi.title: रिम झिम रिम झिम (1942: ए लव स्टोरी) | 1942 A Love Story | Kavita Krishnamurthy
hi.description:
90 के दशक की जादुई आवाजों में डूबी '1942: ए लव स्टोरी' का यह सदाबहार नगमा 'रिम झिम रिम झिम' आज भी प्रेमियों के दिलों को छू लेता है। कुमार सानू और कविता कृष्णमूर्ति की सुरीली जुगलबंदी और आर.डी. बर्मन का संगीत इस गाने को एक कालजयी रचना बनाता है। यह गीत प्यार की उस मासूमियत और बारिश की बूंदों की ताजगी को दर्शाता है, जो हर दिल में एक मीठी याद जगा देता है। इस भावुक सफर में खो जाने के लिए तैयार हो जाइए।



Credits :

Song: Rim Jhim Rim Jhim (1942-A Love Story)
Album: 1942 A Love Story
Artist: Kavita Krishnamurthy | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: R.D. Burman
Lyricist: Javed Akhtar 



Lyrics :

Rimjhim rimjhim
Rumjhum rumjhum

Tum hum hum tum
Chalte hain,chalte hain

Motiyon jaisa jal barse

Jiske liye hum tarse

Do aatmayein khoyi hain

snippet.title: Hil Pori Hila | Bhau Kadam | Gautami Patil | Rohit Raut | Sonali Sonawane | Prasad Shirsath
snippet.description:
The legendary Marathi chartbuster Hil Pori Hila is back with a fresh twist! Bringing together nostalgia, electrifying beats, and power-packed performances by Bhau Kadam and Gautami Patil, this vibrant recreation is guaranteed to get you dancing. Turn up the volume and join the celebration! 🎶

हिल पोरी हिला हे रोहित राऊत आणि सोनाली सोनावणे यांच्या आवाजातील जोशपूर्ण मराठी डान्स गीत आहे. प्रसाद शिर्साठ यांचे संगीत आणि भाऊ कदम व गौतमी पाटील यांचा धमाकेदार अंदाज गाण्याला खास रंगत आणतो.

आता सारेगामा मराठी चॅनेलला सब्सक्राईब करा आणि मराठी संगीताच्या आनंद घ्या ! 👉🏻https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJSX0gNr2U5lawLXE6IjRmA 💜

localized.title: Hil Pori Hila | Bhau Kadam | Gautami Patil | Rohit Raut | Sonali Sonawane | Prasad Shirsath
localized.description:
The legendary Marathi chartbuster Hil Pori Hila is back with a fresh twist! Bringing together nostalgia, electrifying beats, and power-packed performances by Bhau Kadam and Gautami Patil, this vibrant recreation is guaranteed to get you dancing. Turn up the volume and join the celebration! 🎶

हिल पोरी हिला हे रोहित राऊत आणि सोनाली सोनावणे यांच्या आवाजातील जोशपूर्ण मराठी डान्स गीत आहे. प्रसाद शिर्साठ यांचे संगीत आणि भाऊ कदम व गौतमी पाटील यांचा धमाकेदार अंदाज गाण्याला खास रंगत आणतो.

आता सारेगामा मराठी चॅनेलला सब्सक्राईब करा आणि मराठी संगीताच्या आनंद घ्या ! 👉🏻https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJSX0gNr2U5lawLXE6IjRmA 💜

Audio Credits:
Singers: Rohit Raut & Sonali Sonawane 
Composer : Prasad Shirsath 
Music Arranged, Produced & Conducted by Prasad Ravindra Shirsath
Lyrics: Smita Kulkarni & Prasad Shirsath
Programming: Ayush Raut
Dholki: Parth Padekar
Chorus: Ganesh Bagul, Ashutosh Suryawanshi, Anupam Chinchore, Rushi Narvekar & Malhar Beloshe
Scratch Vocal: Tushar Londhe
Audio Manager: Rupesh Shirode
Vocals Recorded at:
Sound Ideaz Studio, Mumbai by Vinayak Pawar (Rohit Raut Vocals)
AMV Recording Studio by Harsh Bhoir (Sonali Sonawane Vocals)
Mixed & Mastered by Jagdish Bhandge | Apostrophe Studios, Nashik
Audio Manager : Rupesh Shirode & Pranav Wagh

Original Credits:

Music Composer -  Prabhakar Jog
Lyricist - Dada Kondke

Video Credits:
Featuring : Bhau Kadam & Gautami Patil 
Video Project Head : Yogesh Kumbhar
Director: Parag Sawant
Associate Director: Ajinkya Manchekar
Assistant Direction Team: Parth Kadam
Director of Photography (DOP): Parag Sawant
Cinematography: Parag Sawant & Anirudh Bandiwadekar
Camera Assistant: Sagar Lohar
Drone: Milind Adelkar
Editor: Parag Sawant
DI: Swapnil Dhomade
Art Director: Ramaier
Assistant Art Director: Siddhesh Tendolkar
Management: Vijay Walawalkar
Production Team: Sahil Naik
Makeup: Tanvi Gosavi
Costumes: Saee Kadam
Choreographer: Srushti More
Assistant Choreographer: Samrath Gavandi
Dancers: Bhushan Bakre, Sanket Hasolkar, Tejas Pol and Pravin Kubal.
Poster - Vinayak Lokhare
Special Thanks: Nikhil Sonawane, Hornbill Nest, Vignesh Ghone, Milind Adelkar, Dr. Pranav Prabhu, Bhai Hadge, Aditya Malekar, Vishal & Harshad Lohar, Nana Keluskar & Parth Keluskar, Kritik Shirodkar, Pari & Advik Kesarkar, Siddhesh Malankar, Sachin Kondaskar, Vikas Kesarkar & Family, Prajyot Khadapkar, Prashant & Kishor Tendolkar, Bapu Rane and Manthan Mundye.

hi.title: 90's Evergreen Bollywood Songs 💖 प्यार भरे हिंदी गाने 💕 Old Is Gold Collection | Dimpal Bhumi
hi.description:
90's Evergreen Bollywood Songs 💖 प्यार भरे हिंदी गाने 💕 Old Is Gold Collection | Dimpal Bhumi का यह शानदार कलेक्शन आपको ले जाएगा पुराने सुनहरे दौर में। 🎶

इस वीडियो में आपको मिलेंगे दिल छू लेने वाले 70s, 80s और 90s के सुपरहिट गाने जो आज भी लोगों के दिलों में बसे हुए हैं। अगर आप भी Old Is Gold गानों के फैन हैं तो यह वीडियो आपके लिए परफेक्ट है। ❤️

✨ इस Playlist में शामिल हैं:

Romantic Evergreen Songs 💕
Sadabahar Hindi Songs 🥀
Old Bollywood Classics 🎬
90's Love Hits 💓

👉 अगर आपको पुराने गाने पसंद हैं तो वीडियो को Like 👍 करें, Share 🔄 करें और Channel को Subscribe जरूर करें।

snippet.description:
Song : Sambavakaari
Movie : Gatta Kusthi 2
Music Composed, Arranged and Produced by Sean Roldan
Singers.: Sean Roldan, Saindhavi
Lyrics : Mohan Rajan
Strings : Rithu Vysakh
Additional Programming : Anoop R Nair
Vocals recorded at Sounds Right by Hariharan Arulmurugan and Roldan Records by Sabari Bharathi Krishna
Vocal Editing: Lakshmikanth
Mixed and Mastered by Aswin George John at Magic Fader Studio
Roldan Records Sound Engineer: Sabari Bharathi Krishna
Music Management: Vishwa R, Silver Tree Talent Management

Produced by Vels Film International, Vishnu Vishal Studioz. 

Starring - Vishnu Vishal, Aishwarya Lekshmi, Ramya Krishnan, Yogi Babu, Karunaas, Muniskanth, Kaali Venkat, Karunakaran, Zara, Mokksha and others. 

Written and Directed by - Chella Ayyavu

Producers : Dr Ishari K Ganesh & Vishnu Vishal 
Co- Producers : Shubhra, Aryan Ramesh & Ishan Saksena
DOP : KM Bhaskaran 
Editor : Barath Vikraman
Art Director : Jayachandran
Costume designer : Ruchi Munoth
Subtitles - Sajid Ali 
Publicity Designer : Viyaki

snippet.description:

Lyrics: 
Paatshahi dawa rakhde aa 
Khandya di daar te nachde aa
Sanu aunda badla laina aa
Vary maar ke dunga napde aa
Phir change mada vekhiye na 
Jado gal aa jave dastaaran de
Sadi pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te
Pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te

Jad kathe ho ke turde aa
Jag vekhe sanu beh beh ke
Pech putta vangu chine hoye
Pehla chiniye rab da na le ke
Keda haakm sanu dub luga
Asi khede aa talwara te
Sadi pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te
Pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te

Asi bibiya bache bacheya nu
Dine aa satkaar bada
Safe kina zyada feel hove
Jad kol hove sardaar khada
Puch leyo abdaali gajniya nu 
Akh rakhan na dinde naara te
Sadi pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te
Pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te

Mandeep maavi kalla kapda nahi
Pagg taj vi hai garoor vi hai
Sada bhaagi lahu punjabia da
Sardaariya da saroor vi hai
Sanu aasra singha shaheeda da
Bhaari pe jiye lakha hajara te
Sadi pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te
Pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te

sadi mein sone ki paddat,
sadi ne sone ki paddat,
600 ki sadi dikhaiye,
aurat ke solah singar ke naam,
9 sadi
